title: MERCH Evangelion Dictionary Set
wikitext:
[]: [MERCH] Evangelion Dictionary Set             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Jan 03, 2018 9:56 am Eva Pilots Speak Volumes in New "Evangelion" Dictionary Set They look pretty awesome. Shame I don't speak Japanese, but I hear, if you look up the word "run away" there's literally a picture of Shinji

[]: Re: [MERCH] Evangelion Dictionary Set             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Jan 03, 2018 12:22 pm Asuka is defined by how she calls Shinji, I'm okay with that. I also like that "stupido" is in the cover, I may consider buying it just for that.

[]: Re: [MERCH] Evangelion Dictionary Set             Quote Post by El Squibbonator » Mon Jan 08, 2018 1:56 am Wait, so are they illustrated with screenshots from the show or original artwork?

[]: Re: [MERCH] Evangelion Dictionary Set             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Jan 12, 2018 12:40 pm The best part is that Rei is the one talking about emotions. If the rest is remotely like that, they absolutely nailed the humor, thats for sure
